src/main/java/com/brihaspathee/zeus/conf.general_idea: Add the @OpenAPIDefinition annotation to the configuration class to explicitly mark it as an OpenAPI definition source.
Import the OpenAPIDefinition annotation class to support the new annotation usage.

pom.xml.general_idea: Bumped the project version from 0.0.1-SNAPSHOT to 1.0.4-SNAPSHOT.

.circleci/config.yml.general_idea: Upgraded the Jira orb dependency from version 1.0.5 to 1.3.1.
Uncommented the build workflow definition to enable the build-and-test job in the CI pipeline.

src/main/resources/application.yaml.general_idea: Added configuration for the member management service URL.
Commented out Hibernate SQL display and formatting properties to reduce log noise.
src/main/resources/application.yaml.human_impl:
#    properties:
#      hibernate:
#        show_sql: true
#        format_sql: true

src/main/resources/application.yaml.general_idea: Added Spring Kafka producer configuration with JSON serialization.
Added Spring Kafka consumer configuration with JSON deserialization and trusted packages.
src/main/resources/application.yaml.human_impl:
consumer:
      group-id: zeus-account-processor-consumer-group
      ... 
      properties:
        spring:
          json:
            trusted:
              packages: "*"

src/main/resources/application.yaml.general_idea: Explicitly enabled Flyway clean operation for local development.
Added specific logging level configuration for Spring Data JPA.

src/test/resources/application.yaml.general_idea: Added configuration for member management service URL in test environment.
Commented out Hibernate SQL logging properties to reduce test output noise.
src/test/resources/application.yaml.human_impl:
#    properties:
#      hibernate:
#        show_sql: true
#        format_sql: true

src/test/resources/application.yaml.general_idea: Added Kafka producer and consumer configuration for integration tests.
src/test/resources/application.yaml.human_impl:
kafka:
    producer:
      key-serializer: org.apache.kafka.common.serialization.StringSerializer
      value-serializer: org.springframework.kafka.support.serializer.JsonSerializer
    consumer:
      group-id: zeus-account-processor-consumer-group
      enable-auto-commit: true
      auto-offset-reset: earliest
      key-deserializer: org.apache.kafka.common.serialization.StringDeserializer
      value-deserializer: org.springframework.kafka.support.serializer.JsonDeserializer
      properties:
        spring:
          json:
            trusted:
              packages: "*"
